name: heho
description: Open-source, self-hosted AI chatbots for company websites, with transparent RAG and bring-your-own LLM providers.

scripts.infra:postgres: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U heho -d heho
scripts.infra:check: docker-compose exec postgres psql -U heho -d heho -c "SELECT version();" && docker-compose exec postgres psql -U heho -d heho -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;" && docker-compose exec postgres psql -U heho -d heho -c "\dx" && docker-compose exec redis redis-cli ping
